channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Spending bill talks bog down after Trump's efforts to slash government
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Before President Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress can enact much of their legislative agenda, they have to deal with some unfinished business — completing work on the current budget year's spending bills. It's a task that by all accounts is not going well.
item.dc:creator: KEVIN FREKING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What has Donald Trump not done yet? Here are some policy areas where he might act next
item.description: Donald Trump’s second administration has advanced an avalanche of policy action and political pronouncements that have jolted Washington and, in some cases, the world.
item.dc:creator: Bill Barrow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Democratic AGs from 19 states sue Trump admin over DOGE access to sensitive, personal data at Treasury
item.description: A federal lawsuit filed by 19 Democratic state attorneys general claims Elon Musk's DOGE violated the law by accessing American's personal data from the Treasury Department.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump ending Kennedy Center board members' terms, naming himself chair in place of Rubenstein
item.description: President Trump on Friday said he would end the terms of multiple members of the Kennedy Center board and make himself chair of a new board, putting himself at the helm of the Washington, D.C., cultural institution.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: West Virginia leads 22 states suing over New York Climate Change Superfund Act
item.description: West Virginia led the charge against New York’s Climate Change Superfund Act, suing to block the law.
item.dc:creator: Johan Sheridan, Fox 5

item.title: Top federal agency with history of wasteful spending could be next DOGE target
item.description: Elon Musk's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) efforts appear ready to shift focus to the Social Security Administration, which is likely to spark criticisms from Democrats similar to those in response to DOGE's moves against the U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID).
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Musk's next target? Trump says DOGE will look at Department of Education, Pentagon funding
item.description: President Donald Trump said he has instructed Elon Musk to look into wasteful government spending at the Department of Education and the Pentagon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: More active duty troops will head to US-Mexico border, bringing the total to 3,600
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Pentagon will deploy roughly 1,500 more active duty soldiers to the southern border to support President Donald Trump’s expanding crackdown on immigration, a U.S. official said Friday. That would eventually bring the total to about 3,600 active duty troops at the border.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Musk says he will bring back DOGE staffer who resigned after a report of racist postings
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk said on Friday he is re-hiring a staff member at the Department of Government Efficiency who resigned a day earlier after he was linked to social media posts that espoused racism.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump administration withdraws support for transgender minors in Tennessee case at the Supreme Court
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The federal government no longer backs transgender minors and their families in Tennessee who are challenging a state ban on gender-affirming care, the Trump administration told the Supreme Court Friday.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump calls for review of all US funding to NGOs
item.description: President Trump on Friday called for a review of federal funding to nongovernmental organizations (NGOs) and for a halt on spending to groups that “undermine the national interest.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: GOP-led House panel to hold hearing on USAID
item.description: The GOP-led House Foreign Affairs Committee will hold a hearing on the U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID) on Feb. 13, as the Trump administration moved to effectively shut down the agency and institute a mass foreign aid freeze. Committee Chair Brian Mast (R-Fla.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, NewsNation

item.title: Member of Elon Musk’s DOGE team resigns after racist posts resurface
item.description: Marko Elez had recently been given special access by a federal judge to highly sensitive payment systems in the Department of Treasury.
item.dc:creator: Bobby Allyn and Shannon Bond, MPR News

item.title: Why CBS stands at the epicenter of Trump's assault on the media
item.description: CBS News appears likely to settle a lawsuit brought by President Trump in a case that legal observers say it should win. The network is caught up in Trump's broader assault on the media and an owner intent on finalizing a sale.
item.dc:creator: David Folkenflik, MPR News

item.title: Minnesota Supreme Court hears arguments on House conflict despite GOP, DFL agreement
item.description: The Minnesota Supreme Court heard oral arguments Thursday morning in a case involving a standoff in the Minnesota House that has dragged on for more than three weeks, though GOP and DFL leaders had reached an agreement Wednesday night to resolve the conflict.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Protesters rally against Trump's stop-work order for USAID
item.description: USAID and nonprofit workers gathered near the Capitol in D.C. to protest Elon Musk's efforts to shut down the aid agency with his Department of Government Efficiency, or DOGE.
item.dc:creator: Luke Garrett, MPR News

item.title: Education a key focus for lawmakers, DeSantis in 2025 state budget
item.description: Governor Ron DeSantis is urging lawmakers to consider his state budget proposal one month before they are back in Tallahassee to begin the 2025 legislative session.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Nevada highway projects stuck as 90-day review plays out; Brightline effects uncertain
item.description: Nevada is waiting for a sign from the federal government: Can we count on funding or not? "So, we have pulled in a lot of what we are doing," NDOT Director Tracy Larkin Thomason told lawmakers on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: NYC mayor downplays economic concerns of Trump deportation plan
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- There have anecdotal reports that immigration raids are driving undocumented New Yorkers into the shadows. New York City has more than 400,000 undocumented workers who help prop up the economy; however, Mayor Eric Adams said he was not worried they would stop working.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11
